headings.text: Request a category, and we'll forge it.

paragraphs.text: Every Phosphor glyph belongs to a theme — a tightly curated family hand-forged for a specific industry. Browse the full library by category and discover icons crafted with editorial intent.
Devices, networks, code, AI — the digital toolkit drawn with editorial precision.
Trees, weather, terrain, and elemental motifs grounded in the natural world.
Shopping, retail, transactions, and storefront essentials.
Healthcare, pharmacy, diagnostics — clinical clarity, human warmth.
Transit, lodging, destinations — wanderlust rendered in geometry.
Cuisine, ingredients, kitchen tools and dining moments.
Banking, investment, currency and fiscal instruments.
Athletics, equipment, scoring and competition emblems.
Furniture, appliances, household objects and domestic life.
Instruments, notation, playback and audio production.
Lab equipment, chemistry, biology and astronomical glyphs.
Locks, shields, identity and access control symbols.
Custom industry sets ship with Pro and Enterprise licenses.
A premium, hand-crafted SVG icon library organized by industry theme — built for designers who care about the smallest marks.
